creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #13)

Hello,
I'm sorry I do not have any running FBSD 13 at hand. Is this issue still present? I can compile POCL on 14-STABLE and CURRENT without issues, 14.1-REL and 14.2-REL as well. 

The latest patch corrects also the opencl header dependency.

The reported issue should be targeted by #ifdef HAVE_SYSCTL_H in the cpuinfo.c patchfile ...
